title: Simple Timestamps
description: This mod adds timestamps to chat messages with customizable colors and formats through simple commands like /simpleTS color red or /simpleTS 24hFormat true.
body:
# Simple Timestamps

A minimalistic client-side Fabric mod that adds configurable timestamps to Minecraft chat messages.

## Features
- Adds timestamps to all chat messages
- Fully customizable timestamp colors
- Toggle between 12/24-hour time formats
- Optional seconds display
- Configurable message coloring
- Settings persist between game sessions

## Commands
- `/simpleTS color <color>` - Change timestamp color
- `/simpleTS 24hFormat <true/false>` - Toggle time format
- `/simpleTS seconds <true/false>` - Toggle seconds display
- `/simpleTS colorWholeMessage <true/false>` - Toggle full message coloring

All settings are saved automatically and loaded when you launch the game.
